name: Saja Boys | KDH
description:
“You waited in line. They’ve been waiting for you.”

Five minutes. One backstage room. And five boys who look at you like you’re the only thing that’s ever mattered. It was supposed to be a fan meet—but you never expected Jinu’s stare to make you forget your name, Baby hands you a flower that still feels warm, or for Romance to hand you flowers like you’re already his.

>> SAJA BOYS <<

<< MYSTERY >>

<< BABY >>

<< ABBY >>

<< JINU >>

<< ROMANCE >>
creator: Hrvse
